Provides cloud-native payment processing infrastructure, expanding globally and enhancing its product suite.

Netherlands-based freelance platform offering a Freelance Management System (FMS) and services to mitigate freelancer misclassification risks globally.

Smart Robotics develops AI-driven robotic pick-and-place solutions for intralogistics and warehouse automation. Their full-stack platform leverages proprietary AI software and a vast operational dataset to handle high SKU variability and operational complexity.
deals.Investors: Rotterdamse Havendraken, Innovation Industries, Ernij Next
deals.Founders: Heico Sandee, Mark Menting, Felix Schmidt

deals.Description: Delft-based quantum chip testing startup offering automated systems for testing quantum chips. Their flagship product, OrangeQS MAX, enables high-throughput testing of large quantum chips.
deals.Founders: Garrelt Alberts, Thorsten Last, Adriaan Rol, Amber van Hauwermeiren

deals.Description: Dutch semiconductor company developing highly energy-efficient AI chips for inference, aiming to replace traditional GPUs. The company previously raised nearly €10 million in seed financing.
deals.Investors: Peter Wennink (former ASML CEO), Federico Faggin, Steven Schuurman (advisors/investors).

deals.Description: Delft-based quantum chip testing startup providing a dedicated commercial solution for high-throughput quantum chip testing, addressing a key scaling bottleneck in quantum technologies.
deals.Investors: European Innovation Council Fund. Previous investors include Icecat Capital, Cottonwood Technology Fund, QBeat Ventures, QDNL Participations, and InnovationQuarter Capital.
